title: Cheatsheets
text: CheatsheetsGetting Started with Julia - live.Fastrack to Julia cheatsheet.MATLAB-Julia-Python comparative cheatsheet by QuantEcon groupPlots.jl cheatsheet

title: Software installation
Class logistics
get_highlights
text: if isempty get homepage, "highlights", nothing else highlights htl """ section div class "content" h2 x "name" h2 p x "text" p div div class "preview" img src " x "img" " div section """ for x in homepage "highlights" htl """ div class "subjectscontainer wide" h1 Highlights h1 div class "contain" highlights div div """ end

title: get_subjects
text: let sections sidebar sections htl """ let input other page.input output other page.output name get output.frontmatter, "title", basename input.relative path desc get output.frontmatter, "description", nothing tags get output.frontmatter, "tags", String image get output.frontmatter, "image", nothing class "no decoration", "tag replace x, " " " " " for x in tags ..., image nothing || isempty image ? nothing htl """ a title desc class class href root url " " other page.url h3 name h3 img src image a """ end for other page in collections section id .pages """ for section id, section name in sections isempty sections ? nothing htl """ div class "wide subjectscontainer" h1 Subjects h1 div class "subjects" sections div div """ end

title: sample homework
text: A Pluto.jl notebook v0.19.25 frontmatter homework number "1" order "2.5" title "sample homework" tags "module4", "track julia", "track material", "homeworks", "pluto", "PlutoTeachingTools" layout "layout.jlhtml" description "sample howework" using Markdown using InteractiveUtils using PlutoTeachingTools, PlutoUI md""" Sample Homework This notebook showcases some of the features of `PlutoTeachingTools.jl` https github.com JuliaPluto PlutoTeachingTools.jl and how to use these to write homework assignment in Pluto. """ tip md"""For a deeper tour of `PlutoTeachingTools.jl`, check their documentation https juliapluto.github.io PlutoTeachingTools.jl example.html """ md""" Useful functionalities `PlutoTeachingTools.jl` has some functions like `correct`, `still missing`, here a few demoes """ correct still missing keep working keep working md"you can also give custom text to the boxes" hint md"this is a hint, hover the box to unblur the text" md""" Exercise 1 a simple exercise Replace missing with the value `1`. """ x missing if ismissing x still missing elseif x 1 && x isa Int correct elseif x 1 && x isa Int b1 almost md"""Your variable has the right value, but it's not quite the right answer. Read carefully the instructions""" b2 hint md"""What type should the value of x be?""" md""" b1 b2 """ else keep working md"""That is not the right answer Keep trying """ end md""" here is a short demo of how it looks like when the student tries to solve the exercise """ Resource "https user images.githubusercontent.com 49938764 249749643 8cc12de3 2b50 4182 b95d 686c2c18332c.mov", width 500, autoplay "", loop "" md""" Exercise 2 Write a function called `myfun` that takes as input an integer and returns its square. Define a variable called `y` and assign `myfun 3 ` to it. """ let if isdefined myfun func not defined myfun else test values 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 msg1 correct for t in test values if myfun t t^2 msg1 keep working md"Test failed for input t, expected t^2 , but got myfun t " break end end msg1 end end if isdefined y var not defined y elseif y 9 correct else keep working md"Evaluated expression y y is incorrect." end md""" and here is a quick demo of the exercise in action """ Resource "https user images.githubusercontent.com 49938764 249748007 d0b2d773 6b21 49d4 89db ad737af510fe.mov", width 500, autoplay "", loop ""

title: FAQ
text: Add basic informationIf you look at the homepage of the template website, you will see it has a bunch of placeholder text, such as “name of your course”, “a short catchy phrase” etc.To customize this, you will need to customize the global data of the website. That is, add basic info for your class.To do so, you will need to fill the info in the files under the folder src/_data. Let us analyze these one by one.

title: Who is Julia?
text: A Pluto.jl notebook v0.20.21 frontmatter chapter 4 section 1 order 2 image "https github.com quentingageclark a11y research 3 blob main src assets imagesandgifs julia00im.png?raw true" title "Who is Julia?" tags "module4", "track julia", "track material", "Pluto", "PlutoUI" layout "layout.jlhtml" using Markdown using InteractiveUtils This Pluto notebook uses bind for interactivity. When running this notebook outside of Pluto, the following 'mock version' of bind gives bound variables a default value instead of an error . macro bind def, element format off return quote local iv try Base.loaded modules Base.PkgId Base.UUID "6e696c72 6542 2067 7265 42206c756150" , "AbstractPlutoDingetjes" .Bonds.initial value catch b missing end local el esc element global esc def Core.applicable Base.get, el ? Base.get el iv el el end format on end using Plots using Colors using ImageShow, ImageIO using CSV, DataFrames using PlutoUI md" https upload.wikimedia.org wikipedia commons thumb 1 1f Julia Programming Language Logo.svg 960px Julia Programming Language Logo.svg.png Julia Programming Language" md" https www.julialang.org https www.julialang.org interactive programming language dynamically typed, compiled in time clear, readable syntax modularity integrates well with other languages free and open source designed from the beginning for high performance" md" \"Julia shows that one can achieve machine performance without sacrificing human convenience.\" Bezanson, J., Edelman, A., Karpinski, S. and Shah, V.B., 2017. Julia A fresh approach to numerical computing. SIAM review, 59 1 , pp.65 98. " md""" Julia as calculator """ 2 3 2^2 6 md""" Variables """ ╠═╡ x 2 ╠═╡ x 3 x^2 1 md""" Functions """ f x,y x^2 y f x,y 2 x^2 y f 3,1 f x,1 f 2 α 10 f x,α 🐷🐱 0.1 f 🐷🐱 function escape count x, y max 100 a longer function the semicolon indicates keyword arguments for i in 1 max 1 loop 1,2,...,max 1 x x^2 y if abs x 2 conditional statement return i end end return max end md""" Plotting """ plot 1, 2, 4 , 10, 20, 30 , linewidth 5, label "example plot" md""" Types """ typeof 1 typeof 0.1 typeof x z 1 0.1im typeof z function escape count x, y x max 100 a longer function the semicolumn indicates keyword arguments for i in 1 max 1 loop 1,2,...,max 1 x x^2 y if abs x 2 conditional statement return i end end return max end escape count 0.1,0.9,max 50 escape count 0.1,0.9,50 escape count 0.5,0.4 y x escape count 0.5, x plot y xs range 2, 1, 1501 xs2 range 0, 0.5, 1001 ys range 1, 1, 1001 ys2 range 0, 1, 2001 zs xs' . im ys transpose and add point by point zs2 xs2' . im ys2 heatmap xs, ys, escape count. zs , title "Mandelbrot set" md""" https en.wikipedia.org wiki Mandelbrot set https en.wikipedia.org wiki Mandelbrot set """ heatmap xs2, ys2, escape count. zs2 , title "Mandelbrot set zoom in " md""" Colormap function """ cmap colormap "RdBu" red to blue length cmap typeof cmap RGB 191 255,87 255,0 burnt orange cmap escape count. zs md""" Benchmark performance """ md""" https julialang.org benchmarks https julialang.org benchmarks """ download "https raw.githubusercontent.com JuliaLang Microbenchmarks master bin benchmarks.csv","benchmarks.csv" df CSV.read "benchmarks.csv", DataFrame, header "language","benchmark","time" mandelbrot df df.benchmark . "userfunc mandelbrot" , sort mandelbrot, time bar mandelbrot.language, mandelbrot.time, label none, ylim 0,10 , permute x, y , ylabel "Compute Time" md""" Interactivity """ bind λ Slider 0 0.01 1, show value true cmap escape count. zs, 0.25 λ im

title: Notebook Info
text: Add basic informationIf you look at the homepage of the template website, you will see it has a bunch of placeholder text, such as “name of your course”, “a short catchy phrase” etc.To customize this, you will need to customize the global data of the website. That is, add basic info for your class.To do so, you will need to fill the info in the files under the folder src/_data. Let us analyze these one by one.
